MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Appelant/Defendant, Cameron Kambiz Razavali is present Respondant/Plaintiff, Grace Balkema is present.

This case is on Calendar before the Hon. Mary E. Wiss for Trial De Novo.

Parties inform the Court that they have come to a settlement agreement. The Plaintiff was given a check outside the Courtroom of which Ms. Bakema has deposited.

The Court continues this matter to Dec-09-2025 at 09:30 am in Department 305 to ensure the funds are transferred to the Plaintiff's account. Parties are to appear if no payment is made. If no appearances the Court will dismiss the Appeal.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Not reported. (D305)
